title: cyclosorus scolopendrioides
intro: Cyclosorus scolopendrioides, also known as the Chinese crocodile fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, but its efficacy and safety need further scientific research and validation.
